title: Surgeon Vacancy at Manipal Hospitals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Manipal Hospitals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Manipal Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Manipal Hospitals:
Manipal Hospitals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Hospitals!
